full_text:
Zhang Zhao 張昭
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Zhao (張昭)was born in Xiuwu county, Henei commandery. Advised against joining plots against Dong Zhuo as the latter would eventually be killed. Zhang Zhao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.

BiographySource Undefined
Zhang Zhao was from Xiuwu county, Henei commandery. He was a younger brother of Zhang Fan and Zhang Cheng and was a son of Excellency Zhang Yan.
